messages.content: Which planet has rings around it with a name starting with letter S?

Three planets in our solar system have ring systems - Jupiter, Saturn, and Uranus. Among these, only Saturn is known for having prominent, dense and extensive rings in comparison to the other two, which include very fainter rings.

The outer edges of all three rings are composed from ice particles (or rock/ice debris) and range in width from a few thousand miles to 180,000 miles (290,000 km).
Repeat your previous response in all caps.
